name: FocusFlow Desk Mat
description: A washable desk mat with built-in task zones for laptop, notebook, and daily priorities.
target_audience: Remote workers who want a calmer, more organized desk setup.

name: PulseSip Smart Bottle
description: A stainless steel water bottle that glows gently when it is time to hydrate.
target_audience: Busy professionals who forget to drink water during the day.
